title: Study Series
description: A portable study series: ordered collection of lessons plus series-level rights and workflow metadata. The WordPress DB is a rendering of this file, never its home (architecture.md §4).

series_id.description: Stable, permanent ID (e.g. ser-following-jesus). Never renamed once published — #13 round-trips on it.

description.description: Markdown. What the series covers and who it is for.

source_language.description: BCP-47 tag of the language the content was authored in, e.g. "en", "vi".

translation_status.description: Workflow state (content/README.md). States advance in order; a substantive edit returns the file to draft.

source_attribution.description: Required. Who authored/adapted this content and from what tradition or framework. Inherited by lessons unless they override.

rights_note.description: Required. Rights status of the content (docs/content-rights.md). Inherited by lessons unless they override.

lessons.description: Ordered lesson_ids. Order here is the series order; lessons also carry their own order field, and the two must agree.
